programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues to uncover the truth behind Lois' online relationships. Today, Dr. Phil opens Lois' safe, enlistsing the help of retired U.S. Secret Service Agent Ron Williams to analyze its contents.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A father pleads for help regarding his missing daughter. Gabby Petito, 22, set off on a van trip with her fiancé, but two months later he returned alone. Police revealed the couple had an incident--caught on camera. Gabby's dad is determined to find her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany claims dad Charlie is scammed by his online fiancée "Stephanie" & her roommate "Carina." Charlie has given over $25K while "Stephanie" maintains a $4.5 million inheritance is coming. The investigation starts in Los Angeles and ends in Denmark!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ben says his wife, Kelly gained a significant amount of weight, is no longer affectionate & stopped cleaning & cooking his favorite meals 6 mos after marrying. Kelly says Ben lost 100 lbs, then became a "narcissist" & a "jerk" Can this marriage be saved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his discussion with Willie Jessop, former spokesperson for the FLDS and former bodyguard of self-proclaimed prophet Warren Jeffs. Jessop comes face-to-face with former FLDS members and critics who say they don't believe a word he says.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pamela says she is likely going to jail for not complying with court orders because she refuses to allow her ex, Justin, his court-ordered visitations. Pamela says Justin attempted to drown their oldest daughter in the pool. Justin says they are lies!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil takes goes inside the unthinkable: making your own child sick to fulfill a disturbing need for attention. The idea might sound unimaginable, but for people with a psychological disorder called Munchausen by Proxy, it's irresistible.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you know someone whose private persona is dramatically different from the face he or she shows to the world? Dr. Phil's guests say their mates lead a double life, and it's wreaking havoc on their relationships.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trust has been ranked as the #1 crucial quality for a happy marriage. Deanne & Brian have been married for 12 years with four children between them. Now, due to alleged lies and infidelity, their family is torn apart and divorce is just a signature away.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues to piece together this puzzle of Robert and the women he thinks he is dating online. Now, an investigation extends to various locations to track down and verify information Robert says he has received from his “girlfriends.” Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In one of the most bizarre love stories to come across Dr. Phil’s stage, now Dr. Phil uncovers a massive secret that changes everything with Ryan and Suzanne. Here is the conclusion to a fascinating tale of lies, deception and emotional extortion! Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: With Nancy Grace, children's rights attorney Paul Mones & criminologist Dr. Denise Boots, Dr. Phil delves into the headlines: a starved & beaten teen escaping his torturers, an 8-year-old boy arrested for killing his father & two reporters found dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Author Dr. Philip Zimbardo, The Lucifer Effect: Understanding How Good People Turn Evil, and Dr. Phil examined what makes a good person do bad things. They continue to explore blind obedience to authority & an eye-opening experiment on group conformity.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Megan and Brandy say grandma Gail, 69, believes she is in a relationship with musical artist Post Malone but she is actually being catfished! Gail's daughter says her mom has an obsession with men. The family is worried for Gail's safety & mental health.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts get a big food package from home and Mr. Drysdale's two associates, Mr. Lucus and Mr. Pendleton think that the crawdads have something to do with the development of military reconnaissance technology.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: The Clampetts try to turn their newly acquired Beverly Hills dress boutique, The House of Renee, into a country store, The House of Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed sends Elly to the Beverly Hills dress boutique he used to own (now the House of Maurice) to learn how to be a lady, where Mrs. Drysdale mistakes her for royalty.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale wants Jed to incorporate for the tax advantages. So the Clampetts take over the top floor of the Commerce Bank and start doing what they can to stimulate the economy by getting more money into the hands of more people.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale gets Jed's old cabin from back home and sets it up in the Clampett's backyard to surprise Granny on her birthday. A coed with a sociology major thinks that they live there as the Drysdale's servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tells the Clampetts that he is building a city on the location where Jed's movie studio is located. The Clampetts mistake a western prop town for the city.

programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Johnny Poke's mother arrives from the Ozarks and Granny's matchmaking begins. Jed and Emma Poke come up with a plan to discourage her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale needs Jed to donate $190,000 to save the Beverly Hills Ballet but he has his hands full trying to keep Granny from heading back to the hills pushing all her stuff in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the butler into staying on, posing as a boarder, so that he can teach the Clampetts how to be more civilized.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts still don't realize that Mr. Pinckney is their butler instead of their boarder. When he tries to leave them Granny thinks he trying to skip without paying his rent.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.desc: Elly May goes to Jed's studio to be in a movie and meet a potential husband.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: Granny wants Jed to find a wife and asks for Mr. Drysdale's help. He introduces Jed to Phyllis but learns too late she a gold digger and becomes alarmed when they head to the track. But it's Granny they need to worry about.

programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.desc: Kelly helps Jimmy treat a bleeding cut, and panics after getting some blood on her hand. David refuses to tell his father that he has dropped out of school. Brandon and Mark hire a confident young woman as their news anchor.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Se hace justicia
programme.desc: Después de la cena de Frank con el abogado mafioso Angelo Gallo, este es tiroteado y Frank escapa por poco. Mientras, Danny es llamado para servir en un jurado y termina siendo la única opinión disidente en un juicio por asesinato.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Mala sangre
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan un homicidio con el hermano de Baez como sospechoso. Frank se entera de que un oficial canino condecorado es acusado de brutalidad policial.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Error de identidad
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan un atentado local, pero enfrentan tensión y resistencia de la comunidad. Mientras, Frank debe lidiar con las consecuencias políticas cuando un hombre golpea a un oficial que fue demasiado agresivo en su interrogatorio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Lazos que unen
programme.desc: La lealtad de Danny se pone a prueba en el caso de un amigo de la infancia vinculado a la mafia. Frank se entera de que el crimen aumenta por una decisión judicial.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: En Kansas ha habido una serie de tornados donde han sido encontrados cuerpos de adolescentes desmembrados. La UAC es llamada para investigar. Mientras, JJ está preocupada, ya que su hijo Henry había estado enfermo y quería estar con él

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un caso se vuelve personal para García cuando la UAC investiga la desaparición de una mujer, en su grupo de apoyo a sobrevivientes, cuya hija desapareció hace siete años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño grupo de jóvenes de la academia militar comete un suicidio en masa, la UAC tiene que ver las verdaderas razones detrás de sus actos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Las tranquilas vacaciones de Gibbs en su remota cabaña son interrumpidas por una visita sorpresa de Tobias Fornell y el capitán de la Marina Phillip Brooks, así como una llamada del NCIS pidiendo su ayuda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que se encuentra una grabación de 50 años dejada por una víctima de asesinato, el equipo del NCIS intenta exonerar a Ray Jennings, el marine que cumple una sentencia de cadena perpetua por el crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el NCIS llega a una escena del crimen de Halloween, Torres reconoce a la víctima como un antiguo amigo de la formación federal de la policía.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que un mural de un artista callejero y activista es robado, la investigación del NCIS lleva a una conspiración sobre un contratista de la Marina y la seguridad de los mamíferos oceánicos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Lazos que unen
programme.desc: La lealtad de Danny se pone a prueba en el caso de un amigo de la infancia vinculado a la mafia. Frank se entera de que el crimen aumenta por una decisión judicial.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Espectro
programme.desc: Danny busca al distribuidor de una nueva y letal marca de heroína. Frank hace todo lo posible para ayudar a sacar las drogas de las calles.

programme.desc: Emotions run high when a dispute between siblings gets out of hand, a man struggles to keep his story straight with the police, and deputies investigate a domestic incident.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The K-9 unit tracks down a man fleeing on foot, a father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son, and a former gang member is found with a stolen firearm.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy calls for backup when he's outnumbered, a former Marine damages his neighbors' property, and a husband and wife are separated after their vehicle is searched.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit switches gears when the driver flees on foot, an altercation causes tension between neighbors, and a driver is irate when officers search his passenger.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A parolee leads deputies on a high-speed chase, police respond to a domestic disturbance call, and an officer helps frustrated citizens settle their differences.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A detective is injured after chasing a man driving a stolen car, a bar fight ends with a couple in handcuffs, and an officer finds a variety of items during a vehicle search.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young man receives a wake-up call when police catch him breaking the law, and officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: ¿Quién Manda?
programme.desc: Una pareja no comprometida que solo busca diversión. Ellos entran en una batalla de egos mientras se enamoran.

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: Soltero en casa
programme.desc: Tripp, de 35 años, nunca ha sido capaz de abandonar el nido. Ahora, sus desesperados padres no aguantan más. Ellos contratan a la atractiva y talentosa chica de sus sueños para que lo haga abandonar la casa familiar.

programme.title: Ghost: la sombra del amor
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze encarna a un fantasma que se alía con una psíquica (Whoopi Goldberg) para desenmascarar la verdad detrás de su asesinato y rescatar a su amor (Demi Moore) de un destino similar.

programme.title: El diario de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: La soltera Bridget Jones decide cambiar su vida y escribir sus pensamientos, opiniones e inseguridades en un diario. El resultado es una divertida crónica de sus aventuras en este clásico de la modernidad romántica.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Al borde de la razón
programme.desc: Después de seis semanas perfectas con su novio Mark Darcy, el pícaro Daniel Cleaver vuelve, afirmando ser un hombre reformado. ¿Encontrará Bridget una forma de hacer que el amor perdure para siempre?

programme.title: Corona de Lagrimas
programme.desc: Refugio trabaja como contadora para poder mantener a sus tres hijos. Sin embargo, la vida de todos da un giro cuando uno de ellos es llevado a la cárcel y tienen que resolver sus propios problemas.

programme.title: Hasta el viento tiene miedo
programme.desc: Tras un frustrado intento de suicidio, Claudia es internada en un singular centro de apoyo para adolescentes con problemas emocionales, regido por la inflexible psiquiatra Bernarda Alquicira.

programme.title: Rosario (LAS)
programme.desc: Una mujer mata accidentalmente a su marido mientras actuaba en una obra de teatro.

programme.title: El proceso de las señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Teresita insiste en acompañar a Hortensia en la cárcel. Ella se las ingeniará para que la metan presa. El director del penal pone a las Vivanco al abrigo de las burlas de las demás presas y de la dureza de los carceleros.

programme.title: Las Señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Dos hermanas solteronas creen que cometer un robo deja de ser considerado como pecado luego de ir a la confesión.

programme.title: El proceso de las señoritas Vivanco
programme.desc: Teresita insiste en acompañar a Hortensia en la cárcel. Ella se las ingeniará para que la metan presa. El director del penal pone a las Vivanco al abrigo de las burlas de las demás presas y de la dureza de los carceleros.

programme.title: Acá las tortas (Los hijos de los ricos)

programme.title: El bufete
programme.desc: Mitch es un abogado atraído por una gran firma con la promesa de un futuro brillante. Las cosas no salen según lo planeado después de que se ve envuelto en un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: Jade
programme.desc: Corelli está hasta el cuello en un caso que puede conducirlo donde no quiere ir. Chazz Palminteri interpreta a Matt, abogado y amigo de Corelli. Linda Fiorentino es la esposa de Matt, Trina; una psicóloga capaz de todo incluso de asesinar.

programme.title: Ley criminal
programme.desc: El abogado Ben Chase (Gary Oldman) defiende con éxito a un hombre rico, Martin Thiel (Kevin Bacon), en un juicio por un asesinato en serie de alto nivel, pero cuando se da cuenta de que Thiel es culpable comienza una tensa persecución.

programme.title: Mississippi en llamas
programme.desc: Dos agentes del FBI de aspecto muy diferente llegan a Mississippi para investigar la desaparición de algunos defensores de los derechos civiles.

programme.title: Asesinato justo
programme.desc: Dos detectives veteranos de la ciudad de Nueva York (ganadores del Premio de la Academia® Robert De Niro y Al Pacino) buscan a un justiciero que puede ser uno de los suyos.

programme.title: 13 ASESINOS
programme.desc: Un ingenuo joven adopta la identidad de un hombre muerto para unirse a un juego de mafiosos de ruleta rusa. Con Mickey Rourke, Jason Statham y Michael Shannon.

programme.title: Sin salida
programme.desc: Un encubrimiento y una caza de brujas ocurren después de que un político mata accidentalmente a su amante. Kevin Costner y Gene Hackman protagonizan esta tensa historia de suspenso político.

programme.title: Una propuesta indecorosa
programme.desc: Demi Moore y Woody Harrelson son Diana y David Murphy, una pareja corta de dinero que apuesta a un viaje corto a Las Vegas que les dé una mano de suerte. Pero las probabilidades parecen más atractivas cuando el millonario John Gage sube la apuesta.

programme.title: ¡Madre!
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence y Javier Bardem ofrecen actuaciones inolvidables en ¡Madre!, el elogiado trabajo de Darren Aronofsky. ¡Experimenta el suspenso psicológico visualmente deslumbrante que dejará tu corazón latiendo y te volará la cabeza!

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Corazón valiente, la detallada y feroz saga de combate, amor tierno y la voluntad de arriesgarlo todo por la libertad. Película de Mel Gibson, ganadora del Premio de la Academia®. En una actuación cargada de emociones.

programme.title: Aliados
programme.desc: Cuando el agente de inteligencia Max Vatan (Brad Pitt) descubre que su esposa (Marion Cotillard, ganadora del Oscar) puede conspirar con el enemigo, solo tiene 72 horas para demostrar su inocencia y salvar a su familia antes de hacer lo impensable.

programme.title: El curioso caso de Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Aguas profundas
programme.desc: Kate (Halle Berry) acepta la lucrativa oportunidad de guiar a un empresario millonario en busca de emociones, por medio del buceo con tiburones en las más peligrosas aguas... fuera de la jaula.

programme.title: Cara o sello
programme.desc: Carlos Mendoza es un policía honesto. Cuando no acepta un soborno y encarcela a los culpables, despierta la ira de un narcotraficante local, que secuestra a su familia y lo hace elegir entre su familia, su carrera y su compañero.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: El último maestro del aire
programme.desc: Aire, agua, tierra, fuego. Se enfrentan cuatro naciones atadas por el destino cuando el fuego inicia la guerra contra los demás. Atrapado entre la guerra, un Avatar descubre que es capaz de manipular los cuatro elementos.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (ESP)
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar Angelina Jolie reinventa al héroe de acción moderno en la película Lara Croft: Tomb Raider. Lara Croft nació dentro de la opulencia y fue educada en las escuelas más exclusivas

programme.title: Stargate: La puerta estellar

programme.title: Héroes fuera de órbita
programme.desc: Casi veinte años después de que se canceló el programa de televisión de culto Galaxy Quest, una especie alienígena pide ayuda al elenco de para salvar el universo.

programme.title: El último maestro del aire
programme.desc: Aire, agua, tierra, fuego. Se enfrentan cuatro naciones atadas por el destino cuando el fuego inicia la guerra contra los demás. Atrapado entre la guerra, un Avatar descubre que es capaz de manipular los cuatro elementos.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (ESP)
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar Angelina Jolie reinventa al héroe de acción moderno en la película Lara Croft: Tomb Raider. Lara Croft nació dentro de la opulencia y fue educada en las escuelas más exclusivas

programme.title: Superagente Cody Banks
programme.desc: Frankie Muniz encarna a un agente juvenil de la CIA en esta mezcla de comedia y acción. Cody Banks es elegido para impedir el complot de un villano que busca apoderarse del mundo. ¡Pero primero, él debe superar su timidez hacia las chicas!

programme.title: Scary movie 2: Otra película de miedo
programme.desc: ¡Alguien llevó demasiado lejos a tu amor por las secuelas! Regresan los personajes cómicos favoritos de 'Scary Movie', con mayor diversión e irreverente de la película original.

programme.desc: David Zucker dirige Scary Movie 3, una película llena de actuaciones especiales divertidas e innecesarias, que se burla de las películas de terror, los éxitos de taquilla, y de la cultura popular.

programme.title: Asesinos internacionales
programme.desc: Asesinos disfuncionales intentan matar a Gunther (Arnold Schwarzenegger), el asesino a sueldo más infame de todos los tiempos, en esta divertida comedia de persecución entre aspirantes a criminales.

programme.title: Pequeña gran vida
programme.desc: Gracias a un descubrimiento científico que permite encoger a los seres humanos, Paul y su esposa deciden hacerse pequeños y vivir en una comunidad miniatura. Paul sabe que algo grande les espera.

programme.title: Los tres amigos
programme.desc: Las locuras de tres actores hollywoodenses (Steve Martin, Chevy Chase y Martin Short) que enfrentan a un grupo de bandidos mexicanos. ¿Qué podría salir mal?

programme.title: Asesinos internacionales
programme.desc: Asesinos disfuncionales intentan matar a Gunther (Arnold Schwarzenegger), el asesino a sueldo más infame de todos los tiempos, en esta divertida comedia de persecución entre aspirantes a criminales.

programme.title: El periodista, la leyenda de Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: En el mundo de los noticieros de los setenta, Ron Burgundy y su equipo son los líderes en San Diego. Todo marcha muy bien para los chicos hasta que ​la reportera estrella Veronica Corningstone llega para cambiar las cosas

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: El Camino Correcto
programme.desc: Arturo, un niño de la ciudad de El Verde Bonao en la República Dominicana rural, aprovecha las posibilidades que se le presentan al ir a la ciudad con la esperanza de ayudar a su madre, que acaba de ser diagnosticada con leucemia.

programme.title: El Alien y yo
programme.desc: Una banda de punk contrata a Pepe, un tecladista con síndrome de Down, pero es tan talentoso que termina por opacarlos en el escenario.

programme.title: Ladron Que Roba a Ladron (LAS)
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Scream 3
programme.desc: La primera película estableció las reglas. En la secuela, la apuesta es mayor. En la tercera entrega de la exitosa franquicia "Scream", todo es posible. Es un juego insidioso de caos de película de terror con sorprendentes giros y vueltas.

programme.title: Scream. Grita antes de morir
programme.desc: Luego de una serie de muertes misteriosas, un grupo de fanáticos de películas de terror se vuelven el blanco de un asesino enmascarado en este thriller exitoso del director Wes Craven, que reinventó el género del terror.

programme.title: Scream 2: grita y vuelve a gritar
programme.desc: En la universidad, Sidney Prescott creyó que al fin había dejado atrás el terror... hasta que un asesino imitador empieza a interpretar una secuela real donde nadie está a salvo ni libre de sospecha.

programme.title: Scream 3
programme.desc: La primera película estableció las reglas. En la secuela, la apuesta es mayor. En la tercera entrega de la exitosa franquicia "Scream", todo es posible. Es un juego insidioso de caos de película de terror con sorprendentes giros y vueltas.

programme.title: Solomon Kane (ESP)
programme.desc: El capitán Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) es una máquina de matar brutalmente eficiente del siglo XVI.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: Cuando su amigo hacker accidentalmente canaliza una misteriosa señal inalámbrica, un grupo de estudiantes se reúnen para detener a un terrible mal que se apodera del mundo.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: Saginaw Trail
programme.desc: Gene Autry is sent to investigate the murders of settlers with the help of Smiley Burnette and two young homesteaders. Gene soon discovers that rich fur trader is behind the staged Indian raids.

programme.title: Winning Of The West
programme.desc: Gene Autry protects a publisher and printer from some crooks who are using Indian raids to cover their bandit activities. When Gene's brother kills the publisher, Gene’s integrity is in question.

programme.title: Ride, Ranger, Ride
programme.desc: Former Texas Ranger Gene Autry receives a commission as lieutenant in the U.S. Cavalry and, along with troopers Frog Millhouse and Rufe Jones, reports to Colonel Summeral at Fort Adobe.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Cariboo Trail
programme.desc: Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: Warlock
programme.desc: An ex-outlaw (Richard Widmark) divides and challenges a quick-draw lawman (Henry Fonda) and his sidekick (Anthony Quinn).

programme.title: Island In The Sky
programme.desc: Set after World War II, John Wayne plays Dooley, a former army pilot flying transport missions, who is forced to crash-land his fuel-starved plane on a frozen lake after it strays from its course.

programme.title: Steamboat Bill Jr.
programme.desc: The effete son of a cantankerous riverboat captain comes to join his father's crew.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: Charlie is out of jail and on the make with a plan for the heist of the century. Aided by top criminal mastermind Mr Bridger, Charlie sets off with a team of villains and to lift $4,000,000 from under the noses of the Turin Polizei.

programme.title: Topkapi
programme.desc: Peter Ustinov won an Oscar for Best Supporting Actor in this lighthearted thriller about five thieves (including Melina Mercouri, Maximilian Schell, and Robert Morley) who undertake an absolutely impossible grand theft in Istanbul.

programme.title: The Spy Who Came in from the Cold
programme.desc: Oscar® nominee Richard Burton* is the burnt-out British agent who refuses to “come in from the cold” to take a desk job.

programme.title: Two For The Seesaw
programme.desc: Robert Wise directs Robert Mitchum and Shirley MacLaine in this spicy and poignant love story about a free-spirited Greenwich Village girl who hooks up with a brooding Nebraska lawyer.

programme.title: Frank Capra's A Hole In The Head
programme.desc: Frank Capra catches lightning in bottle again when he teams with Frank Sinatra and Eleanor Parker in this heartwarming comedy about the problems of a footloose widower, his 12-year-old son, a bongo-playing showgirl and a matchmaking sister-in-law.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The family manages to collect $30 in the family pot and an argument ensues when Edith wants to use the money to set her lyrics for a song to music. Meanwhile, Archie is disturbed by robberies in the neighborhood and wants to use the money to buy a gun.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Lionel are planning on attending a demonstration at the United Nations. However, the rally gets out of hand and news of it appears on TV. This worries Gloria who begs Archie to go down there and get Mike.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A local election has the Bunker family in turmoil as Mike and Gloria are all for Claire Packer, a woman, which is why Archie is dead set against her. However, once down at the voting booths, Archie realizes that he can't vote because he isn't registered.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is shocked and outraged when she receives a series of obscene phone calls, but her biggest shock is yet to come when she discovers who's on the other end.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Everyone gets into the act when Maude recruits her family and friends to sing and dance for a questionable charity telethon on the annual musical.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When a fire breaks out in a restaurant where they are dining, Maude and Vivian escape with only surface bruises, but Walter has to cope with a much deeper psychological scar.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is thunderstruck when the Ethiopian foster child she's supported for 20 years comes to America and turns out to be quite different from what she expected.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fiona takes drastic measures to feel safer at home, and puts herself in danger. Dallas avoids telling Alli the truth about his past. After blowing off a French assignment, Zig tries to impress the teacher,

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya lets loose at a party and posts a video online, hoping it'll change her image. The battle for the student council presidency heats up when Drew enters the race. Connor tries to play matchmaker for his friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Despite her illness, Clare is determined to remain a regular girl. Alli is lonely in Paris and tries to make the best of it without her BF and Tristan tries to 'bro' up while rooming with the guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare receives crushing news while waiting for her MRI results. Needing time away from the hospital, Clare convinces Drew to help her escape.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Why is Becky blowing Adam off to spend time with Todd? Who's Todd? Adam is not liking this long-distance relationship thing. Alli is falling hard for her Parisian waiter and worries maybe too hard too fast?

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Sick of being confused with her twin sister Heather, Erica is determined to define herself as an individual. She finds an opportunity at the Spring Dance, where she is found passionately kissing a strange boy!

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: As Stephanie's mother makes plans to remarry and her father continues to fight for custody of her and her brother, Stephanie becomes increasingly despondent. She even starts to talk about suicide.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: A group of parents demands that Spike be moved to another school because her pregnancy sets a bad example. Some of the students agree, but Caitlin writes an article for the school newspaper supporting Spike.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When the school board votes to expel Spike from Degrassi, the students wonder why Spike is being kicked out. Meanwhile, disaster strikes when Joey and Wheels talk Snake into letting them spend the night when his parents are away.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Though Lucy's friends have encouraged her to report her harassment by a substitute teacher, she is embarrassed by the incident. However, when the teacher returns to Degrassi and assaults another girl, she and Lucy decide to go to the principal.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Wheels worries that he might not pass his final exams, while Joey discovers that he may have to repeat the year. The eighth graders' dreams of high school are crushed when they find out Degrassi plans to add a ninth grade.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Wheels' adoptive parents forbid him to see Joey, but Wheels sneaks over to see him when they go out. When Wheels returns, he finds that his parents have been killed in an automobile accident.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Wheels' adoptive parents forbid him to see Joey, but Wheels sneaks over to see him when they go out. When Wheels returns, he finds that his parents have been killed in an automobile accident.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Leo and Alli are getting to feel really serious. Distraught Drew needs to visit camp for comfort. Maya must show up Zoë and puts an expensive dress on her mother's credit card… nothing could possibly go wrong, right? !

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As summer comes to an end, Becky tries to understand the meaning behind an unexpected tragedy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Adam, the Degrassi students try their best to move on but when it's your brother… And fitting in is hard for Zoë because she's never just been a normal girl. Alli reunites with Leo on her home turf.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew does his best as Degrassi President but without sleep, he's not much good. By Drew's side, Zoë becomes the first lady of Degrassi. Leo does damage control and tries to get in with Alli's friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The opportunity to write for a real-life magazine is offered to Clare but her brain after cancer is not cooperating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to concoct any excuse to save her reputation with the magazine but doesn’t want to play the cancer card.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Focusing more on her music than Miles, Maya lets Zoë talk her into making a sexy music video.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve's on a mission to find dinosaurs that have something a little special: fearsome killers, with incredible abilities! Get ready for a sensory sensation! His quest sees him race in the dark like a Troodon.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes on an undercover mission to unearth the sneakiest dinosaurs that were far deadlier than they first appeared.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is on the hunt for the most deadly animals to have ever walked the earth, dinosaurs. Steve goes on a mission to uncover what was deadlier than the dinosaurs, from monsoons and super-sized sandstorms to ballistic bacteria and gory gas.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall looks back at the most awesome experiments over the series and chooses his highlights.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Discover the beasts of the Ice Age with Professor Alice Roberts. Alice's adventure begins in the Land of the Sabre-tooth.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Alice ventures to the parts of the northern hemisphere hit hardest by the cold - Europe and Siberia. High in the mountains of Transylvania, a cave sealed for thousands of years reveals grisly evidence of a fight to the death.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts journeys 40,000 years back in time on the trail of the great beasts of the ice age. This was the last time that giants like mammoths, woolly rhinos and sabre-toothed cats ruled our planet.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world, the ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength, protect their people and ultimately build their way to glory.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although there are perks to living in their new country home, like House & Garden wanting to do a spread on them, the Ricardos find that it is expensive in Connecticut. Lucy decides to raise chickens and sell eggs as a moneymaking sideline.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, impatient with their egg selling business, decide that they must trade in their 500 chicks for 200 egg laying hens. However, after a couple of weeks, these hens don't yield many eggs at all.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to take part in the fund-raising campaign of the Westport Historical Society and offers to get her husband and his band to perform for their kickoff function. There's only one hitch – Ricky refuses to do it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel is jealous of Lucy's friendship with neighbor Betty Ramsey. Sensitive to this, Lucy decides that the three of them should have a nice lunch together. Although reticent at first, Ethel opens up to Betty upon hearing they are both from Albuquerque.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy must get vacationing Ricky out of her hair so she can do her housework. She and Ethel trick their husbands into building a brick barbecue on the Ricardo patio by first pretending to build it themselves.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Muertes accidentales, suicidios, desapariciones e incendios son comunes para un investigador de seguros. Pero los casos se ven diferentes si se examinan más de cerca. La ciencia forense es una herramienta para exponer el fraude de seguros.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: El Servicio de Investigación Criminal Naval utiliza ciencia forense para resolver tres asesinatos desconcertantes y cumplir con su lema: "A los vivos les debemos respeto; a los muertos, les debemos la verdad".

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1986, la pequeña ciudad sin crímenes de Indiana se tornó violenta por la llegada de un extraño muy peligroso. Después de que un oficial fuera baleado a quemarropa, el asesino psicótico llevó a los investigadores a través del Medio Oeste.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el verano de 1999, Texas fue aterrorizada por un asesino en serie que viajaba en tren. El FBI organizó una fuerza de tareas para reunir información sobre el viajero peligroso y crear un perfil que ayudara a localizarlo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: Perro se agarra de su barrilete mientras va volando, arrastrando a Gato con él, el barrilete vuela sobre el océano y cae sobre una isla. / Perro y Gato forman una banda de rock para poder competir en la Batalla de Bandas de Nearburg.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cat sets out to beat his childhood rival, Mindy Wonderful, and be the first to climb to the top of Mount Nearburg. / Cat, Dog, Mervis, and Mr. Sunshine become stranded in a garbage container.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: CatDog set out to find the legendary Fred the Flying Fish. / The magician Ray saws CatDog in half and is soon taken to jail.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y los bebés tratan de educar a Dil, ya que creen que no es tan listo como ellos. / Los bebés intentan no tomar una siesta para poder competir contra Angélica por un juguete.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo debe irse de la ciudad y Tommy escucha que ahora él debe ser “el hombre de la casa”. /Cuando Julio lleva a Hugo a un Spa para convertirlo en un “hombre nuevo”, a Tommy le preocupa que su padre se transforme en un hombre diferente.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo quiere comprar un auto y va a una agencia de coches donde los bebés imaginan que el automóvil es un submarino. / Carlitos se entera de que es zurdo y Angélica le hace creer que es un fenómeno.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo lleva a los bebés a una pastelería, en donde los Rugrats deben rescatar a Dil, que está a punto de convertirse en glaseado. / Angélica convence a Tommy de que ser calvo, como él, significa que será un bebé para siempre.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: En un zoológico interactivo, los bebés se convencen de que se convertirán en animales si se quedan allí, así que conspiran para escaparse. / Angélica planea una boda para Lili y Carlitos, pero el matrimonio no es lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Luego de que el abuelo les cuenta a los Rugrats la historia de “Las habichuelas mágicas”, se convencen de que Dil las comió y ahora tiene poderes. / Los bebés creen que han convertido a Dil en una sandía.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy se horroriza cuando le dan a Dil sus viejos juguetes. / Angélica se pone celosa cuando Susie es elegida para ser la bailarina principal de su clase de ballet. Angélica decide hacer un show propio con ayuda de los Rugrats.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy y Carlitos deciden separarse para hacer nuevos amigos en el parque, y ambos encuentran sus almas gemelas. / Durante un paseo en el Museo de Arte, los bebés fantasean mientras se vuelven parte de las obras.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando llevan a los bebés a una jardinería para comprar plantas, los bebés creen que están en la selva. / Boris y Minka rentan una cabaña en el bosque y los bebés intentan salvar a todos de unos “elefantes”.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica les cuenta a los bebés una historia de terror en la que ellos son los protagonistas. / Carlitos escribe una carta para quejarse del comportamiento de Reptar en un comercial. Pero ahora teme que Reptar se lo coma.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Gracias a su nuevo auto a pedal Carlitos se vuelve popular en el parque, pero se aleja de sus verdaderos amigos. / Los bebés juegan a hacer videos musicales.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats deciden que es hora de que Carlitos tenga su propio apartamento de soltero. / Los bebés hacen su propia fiesta de graduación y Angélica quiere ser elegida como la reina.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Si Angélica puede mantenerse callada todo el día, sus padres le comprarán un regalo increíble, pero, ¿podrá lograrlo? / Angélica le amarra las agujetas a Carlitos, y Chas cree que su hijo lo hizo él mismo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos no puede decidir qué quiere ser cuando crezca. / Luego de que Boris les lea a los Rugrats la historia del Arca de Noé, Angélica dice que habrá una inundación y que deben construir un arca y buscar a dos animales de cada especie.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica oculta su resfrío para poder ir al Circo del Oso Dummi, y les tiende una trampa a los bebés para que los adultos crean que ellos están enfermos. / Los bebés deciden iniciar a Dil en el mundo de “los bebés grandes”.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El Abuelo sorprende a los Rugrats al competir en un torneo de lucha libre vestido como un superhéroe. / Carlitos disfruta de coleccionar rocas, pero luego, comienza a tener miedo cuando la responsabilidad de proteger su colección crece.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés van al cine y se sorprenden cuando Reptar pasa a ser el malo de la película. Tommy se rehúsa a creer que su héroe se ha vuelto malo y conduce a los bebés a una fantasía que entra a la película en busca de una explicación.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: A Tommy no le agrada la idea de compartir a Firulais con Dil. Por eso, los bebés deciden que deben encontrar una nueva mascota para el hermanito. Los Rugrats hacen una elección para alcalde en la que Tommy y Fili son los candidatos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy cree que se está convirtiendo en un monstruo. Los bebés creen que está bien decirle a Susie que las horribles barras de cereal Reptar que cocinó están deliciosas.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Caesar hatches a plan to forever silence his enemies, Chopper races through the compound in search of the drugged children, and Tashigi's men make the ultimate sacrifice!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy races toward Caesar in the hopes of delivering a beating, Sanji saves a damsel in distress, and Chopper tries to prevent the children from eating the drugged candy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Vergo slug it out in a cloud of toxic gas, Law finds the room that could ruin the New World, and Luffy hopes to bring Caesar's reign of terror to a brutal end!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Law's true ambitions revealed, Doflamingo goes into action in order to protect his criminal operation! Caesar slips away from Luffy leaving him to face off with the frigid Monet, and the rest of the crew face down a menacing dragon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy goes down fast after Monet puts a chill into him, and Trafalgar Law makes a desperate attempt to reclaim his heart during an electric battle with Vergo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Smoker attacks Vergo for assaulting his men, Luffy meets something strange in the trash heap, and a flashback reveals the true depths of Caesar's madness!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy befriends a dragon that used to be a human boy, and Captain Smoker continues his brutal battle with the villainous Vergo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hitches a ride on a dragon, Mocha tries to keep the Master's candy away from her friends, and Zoro pits his steel against snow in a battle with Monet!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: It's Zoro vs. Monet in a duel to the death - or is it? Tashigi comes to lend a hand, and she'll need to bring her full might to compensate for Zoro's weakness! Meanwhile, Mocha is running out of options for keeping the candy away from the children.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper, Nami, and Robin watch in horror as Mocha makes a heartbreaking sacrifice in a courageous attempt to save the lives of her friends!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brownbeard heroically attempts to expose Caesar as a villain, the horrific truth about Punk Hazard is finally revealed, and Luffy puts the hurt on his gaseous enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes Caesar pay for his crimes against the children, and Smoker risks his life for a chance to see Vergo fall in battle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law reaches the end of his epic battle with Vergo, and Luffy looks to land a devastating final blow on the murderous gasbag Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Word of Luffy and Law's alliance spreads throughout the world, Chopper and Brook race to stay ahead of the deadly gas, and Joker sends a team to rescue Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The laboratory crumbling around them, and time running out, Luffy, the Straw Hats, the G-5, the children and all the others make a final desperate sprint towards the one exit left off the island - but Joker has one more trick up his sleeve.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky continues his battle with Buffalo and Baby 5, Nami uses a mighty gust of wind to save the children from a deadly cloud of gas, and Usopp takes a shot at capturing Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A dragon regains his boyish form, a noble warrior once feared dead makes a shocking resurrection, and bitter enemies set aside their differences to enjoy a well-deserved feast!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The weary marines and the rescued children get teary-eyed as they say goodbye to the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Law enters into treacherous negotiations with Joker!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On their way after having set out from Punk Hazard, the Straw Hats find out their next destination - just as a huge wave comes crashing down on the Sunny! But it's rough sailing for the G-5 as well, as Donflamingo arrives on the scene and wreaks havoc!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Aokiji's intercession saves Smoker and sends Joker off to rethink his strategy, leaving unanswered questions about Aokiji's current status. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats catch their breath as the Sunny makes its way through the rough seas of the New World.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Smooth seas stretch out before the Straw Hats as they leave Punk Hazard far behind -- but while they fear Donflamingo's return and prepare to face him, another foe lies in wait, whose powers could be their downfall!

programme.desc: Breed has Luffy, Trafalgar, and Chopper firmly in his grasp with his Peto-Peto power! Breed dreams of a world in which he has enslaved all the humans, but Luffy's stubborn persistence and unwillingness to cooperate may have landed him in hot water.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.

programme.desc: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka, Rev, and Tyr crash land after escaping a gang of Nietzscheans, but soon face a new threat: Rev's need to feed.

programme.desc: Andromeda answers a distress call when a cargo ship is attacked. Meanwhile, Trance is interrogated after paying a visit to the people.

programme.desc: The crew looks for a long-lost Commonwealth leader who has gone into hiding. They find her, but one question remains: is it actually her?

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Women are found brutally murdered and panic strikes Baton Rouge; the city suspects a serial killer is on the loose; in an example of police work at its finest, detectives lead investigators to an unlikely suspect hiding a dark secret.

programme.desc: After a college freshman goes missing without a trace, concerned friends and family talk to police about his last whereabouts; those conversations, however, raise more questions than answers when they point to a potentially deadly love triangle.

programme.desc: A wife returns home to find her husband shot dead, and detectives search for the truth for two years.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Police suspect a mother of two has relapsed into drugs when she disappears, but her family and friend suspect foul play.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a string of elderly people are brutally murdered in their homes along the Mississippi River, a Task Force is formed to hunt down a serial killer before they can strike again.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Tez and the team get in a jam when they recover a parcel lorry that has taken the term 'stuck in the post' to another level. They have the risky job of getting it shifted before rush hour begins.

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.desc: Rescue Op Tez has a stinker of a job getting a bin lorry out of a ditch. After calling for backup and asking the bin lorry's mechanic to assist, Tez puts all his might behind winching the heavy lorry out of danger.
