programme.desc: Bashir and O'Brien link minds with the man who holds the cure to Odo's deadly disease.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: With the Cardassian Resistance crushed, the Federation war against the Dominion reaches the prelude to one final showdown.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The war against the Dominion reaches its final confrontation when Sisko leads the Federation Alliance in an attempt to invade the homeworld.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: While investigating a strange Klingon vessel, T'Pol, Reed and Hoshi become stranded when a Klingon female escapes the disabled ship in their shuttlepod.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: T'Pol is blamed for the Andorian destruction of the sanctuary of P'Jem, and is therefore removed of her position onboard the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: After returning to where they left the Enterprise and finding only the scattered remains of their ship, Trip and Reed struggle to survive and hope for rescue with only a few days worth of oxygen left inside Shuttlepod One.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Encountering a group of Vulcan pilgrims on a mission to explore their emotions, T'Pol is enticed to attempt some of their technique with a handsome and charming pilgrim, Tolaris.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer and his crew encounter a group of alien hunters upon a rogue planet that has broken out of its orbit.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The entire Enterprise crew is knocked unconscious by a plundering Ferengi crew through a Trojan horse gas canister, leaving the ship to be easily ransacked.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Exploring a crashed ship on a desolate planet, Trip finds the stranded crew still alive despite the seemingly insurmountable odds, but something about them isn't quite right.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Wrongfully imprisoned for ignorantly trespassing, Archer and Mayweather are taken prisoner by the Tandarans and find themselves in a Suliban internment camp.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: From a visiting alien ship, a fibrous, web-like creature secures itself inside an Enterprise launch bay and ensnares several crewmen. Hoshi must work to learn the creature's bizarre language in order to save the trapped crewmen.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer must delay the crew's much-needed shore leave to transport a Vulcan Ambassador from her planet of Mazar to rendezvous with a Vulcan ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer and Trip aid a disabled vessel and, in gratitude for their assistance, the vessel's captain invites the two officers to dinner in his desert-landscape village on his nearby home planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Finally arriving at the paradise of planet Risa, the Enterprise crew is able to enjoy two days and nights of much needed shore leave.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The temporal cold war heats us as Captain Archer is taken to the 31st century by the Sulibans.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: As Archer makes his way back from the 31st century to prevent the Sulibans destroying the Enterprise, his crew tries to fend off the violent machinations and interrogations of leader Silik and come up with their own plan to keep the ship safe.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise races against time, itself, when a scientist experiments with time, and claims to have opened a window into another dimension, which must be closed.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After diverting to a secret meeting with an old friend and some of Starfleet's finest commanders, Picard finds the Horatio blown to bits just hours after the meeting and he returns the Enterprise to Earth looking for answers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While assigned to investigate missing outposts in the Neutral Zone, the Enterprise revives three cryogenically frozen people found aboard a wayward derelict Earth vessel.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Deanna is impregnated by an unknown alien life-form, and Dr. Katherine Pulaski joins the Enterprise as the ship's new Chief Medical Officer.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a mysterious void in space and when they move in closer to investigate further, it envelops them and they can't get out.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When the Enterprise arrives a few days early at its rendezvous point to meet the USS Victory, the crew have a bit of leisure time on their hands.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise rescues the captain of a broken-down freighter, only to become involved in a dispute between feuding worlds--each demanding custody of their guest.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The crew ferries a deaf mediator to Solais V to negotiate an end to a civil war.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise responds to a request for medical assistance from Dr. Ira Graves, considered by many to be the greatest living mind in the universe.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise is en route to Star Station India when received a distress signal from the USS Lantree, a Federation supply ship. When they arrive, they find everyone aboard the Lantree of what seems to be old age.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When the Federation promotes an officer exchange program, Commander Riker decides to accept an assignment aboard a Klingon war ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Data resigns his commission rather than be dismantled for examination by an inadequately skilled scientist, a formal hearing is convened to determine whether Data is considered property without rights or is a sentient being.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ens. Wesley Crusher suffers from the pangs of first love when the Enterprise is tasked to transport a young woman, Salia, back to her home where she is to become the leader of her people.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard and the Enterprise respond to a distress call from its sister ship the USS Yamato. It has been facing a number of serious technical glitches and they lost 18 crew members when the containment field on a shuttle failed.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor experiences physical sensations for the first time after Seven downloads his matrix into her body.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: With Voyager under repair, Harry seizes a chance to prove himself as a commander but finds that being a starship captain is more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor is torn between his duty to Voyager and his conscience when warrior holograms rebel against their Hirogen creators.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor questions his decision to join the rebel holograms after they kidnap B'Elanna and kill two innocent organics.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager encounters an energy field that leaves each section – and its crew – existing in a different time period.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: B'Elanna is strangely disturbed by her unborn child's Klingon traits.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The issue of capital punishment divides the crew when Voyager agrees to transport condemned prisoners to their deaths.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A group of Klingons separated from the rest of their race believes B'Elanna's unborn child is the Savior foretold in their sacred scrolls.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager is sucked into an inescapable subspace void which is inhabited only by other trapped vessels battling each other for survival.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew has been abducted and brainwashed to serve as workers in a severely short-handed industrial alien society.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: To save Janeway and the rest of Voyager's crew, Chakotay must convince her that her seemingly happy life as a worker on Quarra is not real.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven's attempt to explore her human side distracts her from her duties and puts Voyager at risk.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Q's unruly and omnipotent son wreaks interstellar havoc when he is left in Janeway's care.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor publishes a holo-novel based on his Voyager experiences which scandalizes the crew.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Plagued by terrifying nightmares, Teyla (Rachel Luttrell) begins to recall a time when she and her father were captured by the Wraith and subjected to disturbing experiments. With the help of an old Athosian woman, Teyla looks deep into her past.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With a group of Wraith hive ships on the way to Atlantis, the team searches for a place to flee and a way to destroy the city. McKay (David Hewlett) leads a team to try and activate the Ancients' orbital weapons platform to destroy the Wraith.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Just as the team is beginning to lose hope, Col. Everett is sent from the Stargate Program on Earth. As Everett and the team strategize, a new battleship, the Daedalus, arrives with a new Zero Point Module, bringing with it new hope.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team is saved with the arrival of Colonel Steven Caldwell, the Daedalus, and the destruction of the two approaching Wraith ships. McKay hopes the Zero Point Module will be the key to their success, meanwhile Ford seems off after an accident.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard starts to question things when strange malfunctions begin to occur after the team returns from a trip to Earth. The team discovers that the Daedalus has been infected with a Wraith Virus, causing the ship to go into survival mode.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The search for Lt. Ford leads Sheppard and Teyla to planet P3M-736 where they are captured by Ronon Dex, a man who is on the run, being hunted by the Wraith. The team offer to help Ronon, going up against the Wraith once again.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While on Planet Thenora, the team is shocked when McKay and marine officer Laura Cadman are suddenly taken aboard a Wraith Dart. When the team shoots down the Dart, they discover a technical glitch has put Cadman's consciousness in McKay's body.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team races to foil the Goa'uld's plans to destroy Atlantis after Maj. Gen. Landry informs them that a bomb has been planted, triggered to detonate the next time the team heads to Earth. Meanwhile, two Wraith ships are heading towards Atlantis.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After Colonel Young and his military personnel are captured by the Lucian Alliance, Dannic abandons them on a nearby planet. Meanwhile on the ship, Dr. Rush, Brody, Chloe, and Eli attempt a risky plan to force the Lucians to surrender.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the need for food and water becoming dire, Dr. Rush manages to find a planet within range that seems viable but can only be accessed by shuttle. When nearing the planet, they encounter violent turbulence and must make a dangerous crash landing.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: The Destiny is on a collision course with an ancient ship found floating in space. Panic turns to wonder as the ships dock with each other. The crew discovers that it might hold the key to a connection back to Earth and other hidden secrets.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: On Destiny, Chloe's behavior has become a cause of concern and a worried Scott makes a shocking discovery while searching her quarters: a journal with Alien script. He shows it to Young and Rush who decide they must keep a constant eye on Chloe.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A black hole swallows the SG-10 team, and O'Neill is sent on a rescue mission. As the hole's pull grows stronger, it draws the Stargate toward it and soon threatens to destroy Earth. Will O'Neill find a way to stop this super-destructive force?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Jackson's body is swapped with that of an old Goa'uld enemy. As Jackson lies dying in the alien's ancient body, O'Neill and Teal'c accidentally switch forms too, and unless the alien is captured, all will be trapped in their new bodies forever!

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: A breakthrough by Cameron places her at odds with Gordon and leaves Joe to make a difficult decision. Hurricane Alicia spurs personal revelations.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: A visitor from Joe's past threatens his newfound connection with Cameron. With Donna out of town, the toll of Gordon's work catches up with him.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Scandal rocks Cardiff Electric as the team finalizes preparations for COMDEX. Bosworth makes a sacrifice for the good of the PC program.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of 'Sleeping Beauty' – but our focus is on the fairy that didn’t get her invitation and stubbornly refuses to listen to the reason why.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: JAG

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: An ambulance pulls up to a crash site where a woman, Jennifer Wilson, is found injured and crying for her baby. Unbeknownst to her, the six-month-old baby died in the accident. A Navy judge stands accused of vehicular homicide.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Central Command coordinates an airstrike on a confirmed target traveling through Afghanistan. After the strike is launched, marine troops assess the damage and they are disturbed to learn that they targeted the wrong vehicle and hit civilians instead.

programme.title: JAG

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Bud has lost his right lower leg due to a mine in Afghanistan; during emergency surgery he faces bad trouble. Sturgis returns to Washington, and Harm and Mac disobey an order from the admiral. Bud encounters an astounding change of course.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A deputy sheriff dies while chasing a car carrying two SEALs in a Navy exercise. The driver stands trial for negligent homicide.

programme.title: JAG

programme.title: JAG

programme.desc: Mac defends and Turner prosecutes in the case of a special op marine who, during an Iraqi mission, may have deserted his team for his own survival. Harm takes on a CIA training assignment in a mach six craft that soon has him in danger.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Over 4th of July Jo's parents tell Kailyn to buckle down or move out, while Janelle signs over custody of Jace to her mom. Leah and Corey give it another shot and Chelsea tells Megan she's going to try to work it out with Adam.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn is forced to borrow money from Jo to pay for school and Chelsea lets Adam move in so Aubree can have a normal family. Jenelle meets a new guy and spends the night with him, while Leah and Corey decide to move in together.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle is trying to figure out how to pay for school and continues to get in trouble, while things get tough for Leah and Corey. Adam moves in and Chelsea tries to hide it, and Kailyn deals with getting kicked out of Jo's house.

programme.desc: Adam and Megan's fighting gets worse and he forces her to move out, while Barbara helps Jenelle and invites her to Jace's first birthday. Leah and Corey's romance heats up, and Kailyn moves back in with Jo's parents.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Corey shocks Leah with a marriage proposal, but things get hard when they get bad news. Chelsea tries to focus back on school, while Kailyn gets another job so she can move out. Jenelle and Kieffer have to find a place to live.

programme.desc: Jenelle and Kieffer ask Barbara if they can move in with her. Chelsea's dad strains her to have Adam to find a job.Kailyn starts dating her ex without telling Jo. Leah and Corey put the wedding on hold to bring Ali in for an MRI.

programme.desc: Jo faces Kailyn about dating Jordan, she moves in with her mom. Leah and Corey plan for their wedding when they get good news about Ali. Jenelle and Kieffer plan to run off to New Jersey. Things between Chelsea and Adam crumble.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah and Corey fight when she reconsiders the wedding. Chelsea breaks up with Adam and celebrates with freinds. Jenelle and Kieffer enjoy New Jersey and Barbara realizes her credit cards are gone. Kailyn settles in with her mom.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea argues with Adam about child support and finds out he has a new girlfriend, while Jenelle has to face the music about using her mom's credit cards.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle is back with Kieffer after bailing him out of jail. Leah feels isolated and decides to get a job. Chelsea struggles with whether to give Adam another chance. Kailyn and Jordan take Issac trick or treating.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah is devastated when she finds out Ali must be sedated for an MRI. Jenelle is living in her car with Kieffer. Chelsea gives Adam another chance but re-tears her ACL. Kailyn can't afford to live on her own.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn moves out without telling her mom. Jenelle files charges against Kieffer. Chelsea relies on Adam to take care of Aubree while she recovers from surgery. Corey and Leah get emotional during Ali's MRI.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ali's MRI comes back negative to the relief of Leah. Jenelle juggles finding peace with her mom and dealing with Kieffer's domestic charges. Kailyn tries a new form of birth control. Chelsea fends for herself after surgery.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara Montero hace una incursión en Queens atrás de Cristóbal, conoce a Calixta y reconoce en ella a una posible aliada. Durante una noche de amor perfecta, Cristóbal y Marisa se prometen ser felices juntos. Tania sufre por separarse de su amor.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara trama un plan para atacar a Marisa donde más le duele: su hijo Lalo. Cristóbal recibe amenazas que ponen a prueba sus valores, deberá decidir entre su futuro político o la felicidad junto a la mujer que ama. Bruno desea que Tito lo consuele.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucas siente miedo y culpa tras matar por primera vez a una persona. Verónica reacciona con absoluta frialdad ante la noticia de la muerte de Prudencia. Ricardo consuela a Patricia por su pérdida. Maximiliano y Valentina tienen un encuentro íntimo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro besa a Verónica y le confiesa que lo hace para recordar a Gabriela, ella reacciona fríamente. La señora Dantés se encuentra a David en el cementerio y escucha todo el amor que le profesa a su abuelo. Aníbal quiere acabar con Gertrudis.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La señora Guerra disfruta de haber separado a su hijastra de Maximiliano. Verónica sabe que Valentina será la próxima víctima. Además, descubre que la abuela de la joven fue envenenada. David no quiere viajar a Europa y se enfrenta a Antonia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro trata de indagar la conexión de los Suárez con la mina del Chamuco. La ira de Antonia cae sobre Cecilia. David no la defiende y Francisca la recibe en su casa. Verónica manda a Gertrudis a contratar a todo el personal del nuevo hospital.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm y Carmela humillan a Franco y acusan a Eva de ladrona, ella se entera de que Reyes es dueño de la hacienda y busca a sus hermanos. Juan obliga al viudo de Eduvina a poner todo en su sitio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco le pide ayuda a Juan y a Óscar, su hermano mayor se niega hasta que Eva lo convence para que acepte. Jimena consigue trabajo, Fernando llega con Pepita a la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes asumen sus responsabilidades en la hacienda, pasan los meses y Norma da a luz a su bebé, Jimena tiene éxito en su trabajo aunque extraña a Óscar, él no aguanta los celos al verla.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan acepta la decisión de su hermano porque es la oportunidad para acercarse a Norma, ella se preocupa cuando ve a Fernando con su bebé. Jimena le muestra a Ruth unas fotos de Libia.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara trama un plan para atacar a Marisa donde más le duele: su hijo Lalo. Cristóbal recibe amenazas que ponen a prueba sus valores, deberá decidir entre su futuro político o la felicidad junto a la mujer que ama. Bruno desea que Tito lo consuele.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Víctor está decidido a entrar en la guerra por la custodia de Lalo y empieza a acercarse al niño. Yaya continúa seduciendo al convaleciente Ty y despierta deseos dormidos en el senador. Amador le planta cara a Estanislao por el amor de Calixta.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal sale en defensa de Marisa y Víctor conoce el peso de su puño. Yaya y Bruno hacen planes en la cama, todo para desestabilizar a la pareja Parker. Hugo tiene problemas con los polleros que cruzaron la frontera. Jerome busca a Tania.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa recibe una citación para discutir la custodia de Lalo, Marcela se pone de su lado y le abre los ojos. Cristóbal se ofrece para ayudarla a dar la batalla por su hijo. Letty sorprende a Sara besándose con un hombre en un pasillo del hotel.

programme.title: The Big T Podcast
programme.desc: Observations and conversations about the sport of tennis.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: Isaac Dogboe vs Jessie Magdaleno
programme.desc: On April 28th, 2018, Isaac Dogboe and Jessie Magdaleno fought at the Liacouras Center in Philadelphia. With Dogboe going down in round one and Magdaleno down in round five and twice in round 11, Dogboe took the victory.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Carl Frampton
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2021 Jamel Herring fought Carl Frampton for WBO World Super Featherweight title in a 12 round bout at the Caesars Palace Dubai resulting in a technical knockout victory in the sixth round for Herring.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Masayuki Ito
programme.desc: On May 25th, 2019 Jamel Herring and Masayuki Ito battled for the WBO super featherweight title in a 12 round bout at Osceola Heritage Park in Kissimmee, Fl. That ended in a unanimous decision victory for Herring.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Shakur Stevenson
programme.desc: On October 23rd, 2021, Shakur Stevenson fought Jamel Herring for the WBO World Super Featherweight Title at State Farm Arena in Atlanta. A much quicker Shakur dominated from the start, finishing Herring in the tenth round.

programme.title: James Toney vs Charles Williams
programme.desc: On July 29th, 1994 James Toney and Charles Williams battled eachother for IBF World Super Middleweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a knockout victory for James Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Dave Tiberi
programme.desc: On February 8th, 1992 James Toney faced Dave Tiberi for the IBF World Middleweight at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic City with a point deducted from Tiberi for a low blow the bout ended in a split decision win for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Freddie Delgado
programme.desc: On June 18th, 1995 James Toney fought Freddie Delgado at the Performing Arts Theater in New Orleans with the bout ending in the fifth round technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Iran Barkley
programme.desc: On February 13th, 1993 James Toney faced Iran Barkley in a thrilling bout at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas for IBF World Super middleweight title with Toney securing the title and victory.

programme.title: James Toney vs Michael Nunn
programme.desc: On May 10th, 1991 James Toney fought Michael Nunn at the John O'Donnell Stadium in Davenport for IBF World middleweight titles with the bout ending in round 11 by technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 1
programme.desc: On December 13th, 1991 James Toney and Mike McCallum fought eachother for the first time at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City for IBF World Middleweight title ending in a draw.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 2
programme.desc: On August 29th, 1992, James Toney rematched Mike McCallum for the IBF Middleweight Title in Reno. This time, Toney came out on top via a majority decision in which many believed the scorecards were too lopsided in favor of Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 3
programme.desc: On February 22nd, 1997 James Toney and Mike McCallum face each other for the final time at the Mohegan Sun Casino in Uncasville in a strong bout that lasted 12 rounds ending in a victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Tim Littles
programme.desc: On March 5th, 1994 James Toney and Tim Littles fought at the Olympic Auditorium in Los Angeles for IBF World Super middleweight titles resulting in a technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Janibek Alimkhanuly fought Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam in a middleweight championship bout at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. Janibek was dominant from the start, scoring a knockdown in round three and stopping N'Jikam in round eight.

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Rob Brant
programme.desc: On June 26th 2021 Janibek Alimkhanuly battled Rob Brant for WBC Continental Americas middleweight title at the Virgin Hotels in Las Vegas with Brant going down in round 6 Alimkhanuly secured the victory in the eighth round.

programme.title: The UnXplained

programme.title: The UnXplained

programme.title: The UnXplained

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Jett Sergeant, son of a notorious outlaw, sees Hollister kill his father in a shootout and vows he will kill the Sheriff. Clay tries to set him straight, but the youth teams up with two of his father's henchmen in a plot a murder the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, Frank Leslie returns to Tombstone to marry the widow of the man he killed and pledges never to use guns again. But four brothers of Leslie's victim come to Tombstone intent on revenge, putting his oath to the test.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister and Claibourne journey to a neighboring town and find it evacuated in anticipation of the arrival of an outlaw band. Clay and the editor are captured and the leader of the marauders is killed as a new outlaw takes command.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister has to fire a young deputy for being 'trigger-happy.' The youngster takes a job as a guard in the Saloon, where he unnecessarily guns down a popular rancher, and when Hollister orders him out of town, the young man defies him.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.desc: When Bat arrives in Lordsbury to meet a friend, he changes his mind, making a 'different appointment,' instead. Three power-hungry ranchers and Lordsbury's top lawman have ganged up on Bat's friend and killed him.

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson becomes a 'Pinkerton.' The famous detective agency baffled in their attempts to expose crime chieftain John Kelso enlists Bat to find evidence that will put Kelso behind bars permanently.

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson takes on the job of guard and bouncer in El Paso's famed Royal Flush Saloon. The most frequent invaders of the Royal Flush are bandit raiders. Dodge City's famed Wyatt Earp makes himself handy in the ensuing fracas.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: It's a showdown at Jackson Hole when Bat Masterson ferrets out the men who murdered one of his friends. Dirty politics 'pork barrel' and two attempts on Bat's life make this a highly colorful episode in the life of the great Bat Masterson.

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tristan's back... but he's not who he appears to be when he kidnaps Mokuba! It's time for Kaiba to stop monkeying around and rescue his brother, but he's confronted by Big 5 Leichter!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Big 5's Satellite Cannon attacks Kaiba's monsters from deep space! Mokuba's unwavering faith in Kaiba inspires him to believe that his brother will pull out the victory, but Noah has plans to ruin their brotherhood...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba arrives at Noah's sanctuary to rescue Mokuba, but Mokuba wants to stay with Noah! Has Mokuba seen the evil within Kaiba, or is something more sinister in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah gives the Big Five one last chance to redeem themselves in a five-on-two tag team duel where Yugi and Joey take on the entire Big Five!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five concentrate their attack on Joey so that Yugi would be forced to duel all alone! Outmanned and overpowered, Yugi and Joey are near the end of the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Five summon an almighty dragon that previously defeated Joey, Mai, and Mokuba! Joey and Yugi pull out all the stops, but is that enough to avoid their minds being scattered over virtual reality?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a duel for control of KaibaCorp when Noah squares off against Kaiba! But can Kaiba fight at full strength after he learns the hidden truth about Noah... and the tragic past that made him what he is today?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark steals monsters into its keep to use as an impenetrable wall of servants! How can Kaiba hurt Noah when Noah has an endless stream of monsters to protect himself with?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's about to finish Noah, but Mokuba protects Noah from his final blow! Will Kaiba sacrifice his beloved brother in exchange for freedom, or will the brotherly bond remain unbreakable?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: For every turn that passes, one of Yugi's friends is transformed into stone! As more and more of his friends harden into solid rock, can Yugi defeat Noah before he runs out of turns and transforms into stone himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are petrified into solid stone statues, but their spirits live on! Their combined souls energize Yugi into a noble fight, but is spirit going to win the duel when Yugi's not drawing the right cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has defeated Noah... but they still can't escape from the virtual world! The real reason behind their entrapment is revealed... as is the true villain pulling the strings!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba squares off against his stepfather Gozaburo for their final battle, Yugi and friends are attacked by endless hordes of monsters! Their only hope is Noah, but they can't expect help from their enemy... can they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Time is almost up before the missile's explosion destroys Yugi and friends! Will the Battle City finalists beat the clock and live to duel another day in the stunning conclusion to the virtual world saga!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends arrive at KaibaCorp Island where the Battle City finalists will compete in the ultimate dueling arena! Get ready for the awesome four-person battle royal where any duelist can attack anyone else!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Honor, friendship, revenge... As each duelist remembers what they're fighting for, the battle royal rages on where none of the duelists know where the next attack is going to come from!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey may have fought some of the fiercest fights in Battle City, but has all his training taught him to become an elite duelist? Joey's gonna show what he's made of in the conclusion to the four-man battle royal!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik ensnares Joey in a Shadow Game where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters... literally! Every time a monster received damage, the duelist feels the pain instead!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik's Helpoemer send Joey's powerful cards to the graveyard before Joey can use them! Running low on cards and life points, Joey's opportunities for staging a comeback are nearly depleted!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey thinks this duel can't turn any worse... but Marik has all the pieces necessary to summon The Winged Dragon of Ra! Can Joey prevent Marik from summoning the Egyptian God Card, or is victory simply not in the cards?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik transforms The Winged Dragon of Ra into its powerful form, the Egyptian God Phoenix! If Joey can't withstand the Phoenix's blazing fire, he'll lose the duel... plus his only chance to save Mai from her mental prison!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the rematch we've all been waiting for! Yugi and Kaiba square off for the first time since Duelist Kingdom in front of thousands of ravenous fans for the right to challenge Marik! It's time to duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba has all the monsters necessary to summon Obelisk the Tormentor to finish Yugi off! Though overwhelmed and outmatched, nothing is going to stop Yugi from trying to summon his Egyptian God first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon clashes against Kaiba's Obelisk the Tormentor, what will happen when two Egyptian Gods fight each other? It's time to find out which Egyptian God is truly stronger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The clash of the two Egyptian God Monsters releases mystical energies that show Yugi and Kaiba visions of the ancient Egyptian past! What new answers do these images unlock, and what prophecies do they make for the future?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?
